response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse experience across architectures and languages, but lacks clear leadership evidence in IT consulting, minimal UML documentation, and critically, only has basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for client-facing advisory work in a German-market IT consulting firm.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack and systems-level development across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops/courses
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (C1 required)
No explicit evidence of architectural leadership or client advisory experience in IT consulting
No mention of UML, requirements management, or compliance/security frameworks in resume
